fixture: 059_select_planner_limits_c

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    SELECT widgets.id FROM widgets, widgets AS other
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      <empty>

statement 3:
  sql:
    SELECT left_widget.id FROM widgets AS left_widget JOIN widgets AS right_widget USING (id)
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 0A000] at 1:28 (offset 27): JOIN ... USING is not supported in Phase 2 planner

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT public.widgets.id FROM widgets
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42601] at 1:8 (offset 7): expected expression, found keyword "PUBLIC"
      [1] ERROR [SQLSTATE 42601] at 1:14 (offset 13): expected semicolon or end of input, found punctuation "."

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM widgets
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> BIGINT NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 0
